title: How Google Reviews Impact Local SEO Rankings: 2026 Data Study
titleZh: Google 評論如何影響本地 SEO 排名：2026 數據研究
targetQuery: google reviews seo, do google reviews help seo ranking, reviews local search ranking
metaDescription: Yes, Google reviews directly impact local SEO ranking. They account for 17% of local pack ranking factors. This article explains how review quantity, recency, and keywords affect your search visibility.
author: Sarah Kim
